docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED. COPY OF REQUEST TO ACCOUNTING DEPT BASKET. (RE: PAYMENT TO COURT BY DEFENDANT, IN CASH, ON JAN-24-2020) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCFADDEN, PORTERY

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCFADDEN, PORTERY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $3,008.22 RE 36273 FOR TRANSACTION W0520124D006 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO PORTERY MCFADDEN, DOC#1910503301, WARRANT #38206296, DATED MAY-11-2020
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCFADDEN, PORTERY AS TO DEFENDANT GAITORS, ELVERETT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCFADDEN, PORTERY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAITORS, ELVERETT $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, COURT FINDS DEFENDANT'S WORK WAS INCOMPLETE AND DEFECTIVE. COURT ORDERS REFUND OF $3000. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GAITORS, ELVERETT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2020 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT GAITORS, ELVERETT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF PORTERY MCFADDEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ELVERETT GAITORS IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IN CASE FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT GAITORS, ELVERETT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
